rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARY JAN CHOW YEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Mrs. Yun Shang Zhous Petition For Amendment Of 9-19-2014 Order For Distribution, And To Vacate The 12-03-2015 Order; Memorandum In Support; Declaration Of Yun Shang Zhou; Request For Judicial Notice; Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: The motion for reconsideration is denied. Yun Shang Zhou failed to explain why her new equal protection clause arguments were not made prior to the initial ruling. Also the motion is untimely. The prevailing party must provide a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest must notify the court and opposing counsel no later than 4/6/2016, at 4:00 p.m.
